org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory

Class AbstractFigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory.AbstractFigureFactory<G>
  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graphs supported by this factory.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    FigureFactory<G>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractStandardFigureFactory

    public abstract class AbstractFigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
extends Object
implements FigureFactory<G>
    This class is a factory of figures that permits to create a figure and bind it to a model element.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static float FREE_EDGE_SIZE
      Maximal width and height for the new edges that have at least one free end.
      static int TRIES
      Maximal number of tries before the creation of a figure failed.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AbstractFigureFactory() 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addCollisionAvoider(CollisionAvoider collisionAvoider)
      Add a collision avoider that may be used by this factory.
      Figure createFigureFor(UUID viewID, Rectangle2f documentRect, G graph, ModelObject object)
      Create a figure for the given object and try to put it in the best position.
      protected abstract Dimension getPreferredNodeSize(Node<?,?,?,?> node)
      Replies the preferred size for the specified node.
      void removeCollisionAvoider(CollisionAvoider collisionAvoider)
      Remove a collision avoider to be no more used by this factory.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

        Maximal number of tries before the creation of a figure failed.

    • Method Detail

      • addCollisionAvoider

        public void addCollisionAvoider(CollisionAvoider collisionAvoider)
        Add a collision avoider that may be used by this factory.
        Specified by:
        addCollisionAvoider in interface FigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>

      • removeCollisionAvoider

        public void removeCollisionAvoider(CollisionAvoider collisionAvoider)
        Remove a collision avoider to be no more used by this factory.
        Specified by:
        removeCollisionAvoider in interface FigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>

      • createFigureFor

        public Figure createFigureFor(UUID viewID,
                     Rectangle2f documentRect,
                     G graph,
                     ModelObject object)
                       throws FigureFactoryException
        Create a figure for the given object and try to put it in the best position.
        Specified by:
        createFigureFor in interface FigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
        Parameters:
        viewID - is the identifier of the view.
        documentRect - is the area covered by the document.
        graph - is the graph inside which the model was added.
        object - is the model object for which a view should be created.
        Returns:
        the created view.
        Throws:
        FigureFactoryException

      • getPreferredNodeSize

        protected abstract Dimension getPreferredNodeSize(Node<?,?,?,?> node)
        Replies the preferred size for the specified node.
        Parameters:
        node -
        Returns:
        the size, never null.
